title: fix bug to not separate each --label value with comma
body:
fix #1414 
Change `StringSliceVarP` to `StringArrayVarP`. Avoid to separate each flag value with comma.
After this patch
```
"Labels": {
                "exec": "podman run -it --mount=type=bind,bind-propagation=Z,source=,destination= /script",
                "maintainer": "Clement Verna <cverna@fedoraproject.org>"
            }
```
Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

Change LGTM and tests well.  I love it when a fix is that simple.
@QiWang19 if you could, please tend to a couple of typos.  Please change 'falg' in the title to 'flag' and 'sepread' to 'spread' in the description.

@QiWang19 Can you change the commit message to match the github message, and then we can merge.  We want more information in the git checkin so it is easier for people to look at the logs and see what has happened.

@QiWang19 You did not add additional data to the commit.

Commit should have \:

```
fix #1414
Change StringSliceVarP to StringArrayVarP. Avoid to separate each flag value with comma.
After this patch

"Labels": {
                "exec": "podman run -it --mount=type=bind,bind-propagation=Z,source=,destination= /script",
                "maintainer": "Clement Verna <cverna@fedoraproject.org>"
            }
Signed-off-by: Qi Wang qiwan@redhat.com
```
